name: How is AI SEO different from regular SEO?
description: Regular SEO aims for rankings; AI SEO aims to be chosen as a source in AI-generated answers. The overlap is strong, but AI SEO puts more weight on direct answer

mainEntity.name: How is AI SEO different from regular SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: The main difference is that classic SEO focuses on ranking web pages in search results, while AI SEO focuses on being selected as a source in AI-generated answers. Both rely on quality content and technical health, but AI SEO puts more emphasis on direct answers, structure, and source credibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: Regular SEO aims for rankings; AI SEO aims to be chosen as a source in AI-generated answers. The overlap is strong, but AI SEO puts more weight on direct answers and source trust.
